name_en: 💖Includes full original green box packaging💖Gucci Luce series card holder. The Gucci Luce collection exudes a playful and fun vibe, with "Luce" meaning "Light" in Italian. Original GG canvas infuses this streamlined card holder with design essence. Blue leather trim and light gold-tone hardware complement the beige and blue pattern. Beige and blue classic GG canvas, blue leather, light gold-tone metal hardware, cloud print fabric lining, Gucci logo zip pull, exterior: 3 card slots, zip closure.

Model: 790033.
